component.description: In file mode, the workspace-relative path to the child component TypeScript file to embed (e.g. 'projects/app/src/app/hero-card/hero-card.ts'). In package mode (when 'from' is set), the exported class name to embed (e.g. 'MatDateRangePicker').

parent.description: Workspace-relative path to the parent component TypeScript file that hosts the embedded child (e.g. 'projects/app/src/app/app.ts').

from.description: Module specifier to import the component class from. When provided, 'component' is treated as the class name to import from this module instead of a local file path (e.g. '@angular/material/datepicker' for Angular Material's MatDateRangePicker).

selector.description: Element selector for the embedded component (package mode only). Defaults to the dasherized class name (e.g. 'mat-date-range-picker').

inputs.description: Comma-separated list of input names to wire on the embedded element (package mode only).

outputs.description: Comma-separated list of output names to bind to on<Output>() handlers (package mode only).
